name: peerproof
description: An executable peer reviewer that turns scientific claims into auditable tests.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check bin/peerproof.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check src/build-integrity.js && node --check src/runtime-closure.js && node --check src/runtime-assets.js && node --check src/public-evidence-bundle.js && node --check src/independent-evidence-audit.js && node --check src/verifiers/summary-matrix.js && node --check scripts/generate-build-manifest.js && node --check scripts/build-integrity-check.js && node --check scripts/live-smoke.js && node --check scripts/agent-eval.js && node --check scripts/policy-profile-eval.js && node --check scripts/policy-bundle-check.js && node --check scripts/docker-smoke.js && node --test && node scripts/build-integrity-check.js && node scripts/policy-bundle-check.js && node scripts/policy-profile-eval.js
